title: Daily Brief - March 23, 2026
body:
Top leads identified today:

1. John Ketchum (NextEra Energy CEO) - $19.61M Jupiter mansion purchase, $10M+ annual income, prime VUL/estate planning prospect

2. Anant Bhalla (American Equity Investment Life CEO) - $15.1M Coconut Grove penthouse, $5M+ annual income, perfect cross-sell for advanced insurance strategies

3. Victor Delerme, CPA - Top CPA partnership target, specializing in high-income entrepreneurs, Act 60 tax optimization, no existing advisor relationships

4. Elena Skvortsova & Maximilian Maruna - $19.8M Coconut Grove penthouse, international executives needing cross-border wealth planning

5. Reid Nagle (Private Equity Founder) - $8.3M Sunny Isles condo, carried interest income, needs tax-efficient wealth management
